error_signature: no tables showing when making a collection
title: No tables visible in Supabase plugin for second project
symptom: When trying to create a collection in a second WeWeb project using the Supabase plugin, no tables are displayed. This issue persists despite attempts to adjust Row Level Security (RLS) settings.
applies_when: Connecting to a second Supabase project
not_this_if: Tables are visible in the backend section of Supabase
root_cause: The issue arises when the RLS policies in Supabase are not configured correctly, preventing the WeWeb application from accessing the necessary tables. Specifically, if the roles are not set to allow access, the tables will not be visible.
fix_steps: Change one of the policy roles to 'authenticated'
Ensure the public schema is accessible for all roles
Refresh the WeWeb project to see the tables
agent_instruction: Adjust the RLS policy in Supabase to allow authenticated access and refresh the WeWeb project.
